task: https://github.com/moltis-org/moltis/issues/681 makes total sense, plan for a fix. If going with the config flag, you could leave the UI but show something like "terminal has been disabled". The issue I see tho, is this could be reenabled through the web-ui config editor. What do you think?
user_feedback_text: https://github.com/moltis-org/moltis/issues/681 makes total sense, plan for a fix. If going with the config flag, you could leave the UI but show something like "terminal has been disabled". The issue I see tho, is this could be reenabled through the web-ui config editor. What do you think?
